.gtd-legend-note{font-size:.8rem;opacity:.85;}
/* Let long code/paths wrap so the wide reference tables fit without their own
   horizontal scrollbar (Material wraps each table in a scroller at runtime). */
.md-typeset table{font-size:.78rem;}
.md-typeset table code{font-size:.92em;}
/* First-column identifiers (variable / DC / recipe names) stay on one line;
   only the other columns' long paths may wrap. */
.md-typeset table td:first-child{white-space:nowrap;}
.md-typeset table td:not(:first-child) code{overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
.gtd-mtx{margin:.8rem 0;}
.gtd-mtx table{border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:0;font-size:.7rem;}
.gtd-mtx th,.gtd-mtx td{border:1px solid var(--md-default-fg-color--lightest,#e6e6e6);padding:2px 5px;text-align:center;}
.gtd-mtx thead th{background:#45B8AC;color:#fff;vertical-align:bottom;white-space:nowrap;font-size:.64rem;line-height:1.12;}
.gtd-mtx th.dc{text-align:left;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600;background:var(--md-default-bg-color,#fff);}
.gtd-mtx thead th.dc{background:#45B8AC;color:#fff;}
/* Only large matrices get the capped, scroll-both-ways container with a pinned
   header row + first column; tables that fit the page render plain (no overflow). */
.gtd-mtx.scroll{max-height:75vh;overflow:auto;}
.gtd-mtx.scroll thead th{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:2;}
.gtd-mtx.scroll th.dc{position:sticky;left:0;z-index:1;}
.gtd-mtx.scroll thead th.dc{z-index:3;}
.gtd-mtx td.plus,.gtd-mtx td.minus,.gtd-mtx td.swap{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1;}
.gtd-mtx td.plus{color:#1e8e5a;}
.gtd-mtx td.minus{color:#c0392b;}
.gtd-mtx td.swap{color:#b9770e;}
.gtd-mtx tbody tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--md-default-fg-color--lightest,#f6f8fa);}
.gtd-mtx code{background:none;padding:0;color:inherit;}
.gtd-links{margin:1rem 0;}

.gtd-links tbody tr:nth-child(even){background:var(--md-default-fg-color--lightest,#f6f8fa);}

### Template variables

Variables you provide when running the template — `DATA_ROOT` via `--data-root`, the rest via `--var NAME=value`:

| Variable | Required | Description |
|---|:--:|---|
| `DATA_ROOT` | ✓ | Root directory containing ampliseq pipeline output (multiqc/, qiime2/) |
| `SAMPLESHEET_FILE` | ✓ | Path to ampliseq samplesheet CSV (always produced by the pipeline) |
| `METADATA_FILE` | — | Path to sample metadata TSV (--metadata in ampliseq run). Optional. |

### Data collections

8 data collections — <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">7 required</span> <span class="gtd-badge gtd-opt">1 optional</span>.

| Tag | Type | Source | Recipe / scan target | Status |
|---|---|---|---|:--:|
| `multiqc_data` | MultiQC | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-scan">scan</span> | `multiqc/multiqc_data/multiqc.parquet` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |
| `samplesheet` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-scan">scan</span> | `{SAMPLESHEET_FILE}` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |
| `metadata` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-scan">scan</span> | `{METADATA_FILE}` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-opt">optional</span> |
| `alpha_diversity` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-transformed">transformed</span> | `nf-core/ampliseq/alpha_diversity.py` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |
| `alpha_rarefaction` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-transformed">transformed</span> | `qiime2/alpha_rarefaction.py` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |
| `taxonomy_composition` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-transformed">transformed</span> | `qiime2/taxonomy_composition.py` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |
| `taxonomy_rel_abundance` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-transformed">transformed</span> | `nf-core/ampliseq/taxonomy_rel_abundance.py` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |
| `ancombc_results` | Table | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-transformed">transformed</span> | `qiime2/ancombc.py` | <span class="gtd-badge gtd-req">required</span> |

### Conditional routes

Rows are data collections; columns are the variables you set or `params.json` flags auto-detected from the run. Each filled cell is the effect of **setting** that variable; an **empty cell** means that variable leaves the collection unchanged. (6 collections are unaffected by any variable — present on every run.)

<p class="gtd-legend"><span class="gtd-badge gtd-plus-chip">+ included</span><span class="gtd-badge gtd-minus-chip">− removed</span><span class="gtd-badge gtd-swap-chip">⇄ repointed</span></p>

<table>
<thead><tr><th class="dc">Data collection</th><th><code>METADATA_FILE</code></th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><th class="dc"><code>metadata</code></th><td class="plus" title="included only when METADATA_FILE is set">+</td></tr>
<tr><th class="dc"><code>ancombc_results</code></th><td class="plus" title="included only when METADATA_FILE is set">+</td></tr>
</tbody></table></div>

### Cross-DC links

6 links — selecting a value in the **source** collection filters the **target**. The join column is shown after the source.

<div class="gtd-links">
<table>
<thead><tr><th>Source · column</th><th></th><th>Target</th><th>Filters</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td><code>samplesheet</code> <span class="col">·&nbsp;sampleID</span></td><td class="arr">→</td><td><code>multiqc_data</code></td><td>Filter MultiQC by samplesheet samples</td></tr>
<tr><td><code>metadata</code> <span class="col">·&nbsp;sample</span></td><td class="arr">→</td><td><code>multiqc_data</code></td><td>Filter MultiQC by metadata samples (habitat / date selections)</td></tr>
<tr><td><code>metadata</code> <span class="col">·&nbsp;sample</span></td><td class="arr">→</td><td><code>alpha_diversity</code></td><td>Filter alpha diversity by metadata samples</td></tr>
<tr><td><code>metadata</code> <span class="col">·&nbsp;sample</span></td><td class="arr">→</td><td><code>alpha_rarefaction</code></td><td>Filter alpha rarefaction by metadata samples</td></tr>
<tr><td><code>metadata</code> <span class="col">·&nbsp;sample</span></td><td class="arr">→</td><td><code>taxonomy_composition</code></td><td>Filter taxonomy composition by metadata samples</td></tr>
<tr><td><code>metadata</code> <span class="col">·&nbsp;sample</span></td><td class="arr">→</td><td><code>taxonomy_rel_abundance</code></td><td>Filter taxonomy rel abundance by metadata samples</td></tr>
</tbody></table></div>

### Recipes

Each recipe reshapes raw pipeline output into a tidy table. The name links to its source; *Output* lists the validated `EXPECTED_SCHEMA` columns.

| Recipe | Transforms | Output |
|---|---|---|
| [`nf-core/ampliseq/alpha_diversity.py`](https://github.com/depictio/depictio/blob/main/depictio/projects/nf-core/ampliseq/recipes/alpha_diversity.py) | Transform QIIME2 alpha diversity vector to per-sample Faith PD table. | `sample`, `faith_pd` |
| [`nf-core/ampliseq/taxonomy_rel_abundance.py`](https://github.com/depictio/depictio/blob/main/depictio/projects/nf-core/ampliseq/2.14.0/recipes/taxonomy_rel_abundance.py) | Transform QIIME2 relative abundance table to long-format per-sample taxonomy table. | `sample`, `taxonomy`, `rel_abundance`, `habitat`, `Kingdom`, `Phylum` |
| [`qiime2/alpha_rarefaction.py`](https://github.com/depictio/depictio/blob/main/depictio/catalog/qiime2/alpha_rarefaction.py) | Transform QIIME2 alpha rarefaction wide CSV to long-format rarefaction curves. | `sample`, `depth`, `iter`, `faith_pd` |
| [`qiime2/ancombc.py`](https://github.com/depictio/depictio/blob/main/depictio/catalog/qiime2/ancombc.py) | Merge ANCOM-BC differential abundance results (5 files) into one long-format table. | `id`, `contrast`, `lfc`, `p_val`, `q_val`, `w`, `se`, `Kingdom`, `Phylum`, `neg_log10_qval`, `significant` |
| [`qiime2/taxonomy_composition.py`](https://github.com/depictio/depictio/blob/main/depictio/catalog/qiime2/taxonomy_composition.py) | Transform QIIME2 barplot CSV (wide) to long-format taxonomy composition table. | `sample`, `taxonomy`, `count` |
